notes: v0.28.8 — LANCE prototypes round 2. TESTS > LANCE wiped of rhombus-based variants; six fully-custom silhouettes that don't share the LANCE mandala outer: ARROWHEAD / CRESCENT / WEDGE / DISC / OCTOPOD / TRIDENT. Each is a brand-new shape, drawn by its own routine instead of the locked rhombus outline. Pick a favourite and we'll canonise it into the LANCE roster.
